VQE_DroneFactory.questDescriptionRules.r.li:
questDescription->[asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has tracked down the source of the drone resurgences. A dedicated group of pirates have been using the stray drones as a play for a novelty market, and have appropriated an ancient factory as their headquarters.

The site is manufacturing large amounts of drones, and is selling them to other pirate factions at premium prices. Until this site is taken out, pirate raiding parties might purchase these drones and use them in their attacks.

[asker_nameDef] suggests they have a genius in captivity supplying them with their blueprints, known only as The Tinkerer.

You can free their captive mastermind from his captivity, or kill him to prevent his ancient knowledge from being exploited further. The pirates won't go out without a fight, and will likely continue to produce drones during the approach and defend alongside them.

Defenders:
[ListOfEnemies]
